data.label: AppSealing
data.description: AppSealing 是唯一的云端按需付费解决方案，可在无需编写任何代码的情况下保护移动应用。该方案易于使用，能够防止黑客攻击和非法的应用篡改，并通过 RASP 安全特性在运行时保障应用安全。

data.label: AppSealing
data.description: AppSealing is the only cloud-based pay-as-you-go solution to protect mobile apps without writing a single line of code. Our solution is easy to use and allows you to protect mobile apps from hackers and illegal application modification, thus making it secure in run-time with RASP Security Features.
